title: Lesson 62 (Vocab) - チョコ, トラック, シャツ...
description: チョコ (Chocolate) and ジュース (Juice). トラック (Truck) uses both a small ュ AND a small ッ!

items.gloss: truck; lorry; track (running, CD, etc.); track events
shirt (underwear); undershirt; singlet; shirt (outerwear, esp. dress shirt)
juice; soft drink (usu. fruit-based); sweetened drink
